title: 朝日杯FSの後に・イントロダクション

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Trainer! I'm back.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Haha, thank you. It was a really fantastic race.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Maybe it's because no one wanted to mess up in
such a big event, but the other runners used
slightly different strategies than they had in the
past.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
We'll need to factor that into our strategy going
forward. Let's talk about it on our way home.
Starting with what happened at the gate...

We discuss different adjustments to include in her
calculations all the way back to the academy.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Oh, we're back already. That was fast.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
But since we've come up with so many ideas, I'd
like to give some of them a try.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Fortunately, we still have some time until curfew.
choice_data_list: Okay, but let's try to keep it short.
Okay, but let's try to keep it short.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Hehe, all right. Thanks for helping with this.

Biwa Hayahide and I start heading toward the
training course, when...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Hm? Isn't that...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Pant... Pant...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Geh...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Taishin! Are you okay?!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Tch... I'm fine. I can keep going.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
You saw Hayahide's race. She was amazing. I want
to win harder than ever, but...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: All I've been hearing about is how great she is or how she's unbeatable. It's so annoying!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: They're all just saying that because they've never seen me run!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Taishin...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Wait! Taishiiin!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Well, I'm not gonna lose to either of you!

text_block_list.name: The Two
text_block_list.text: RAAAH! AAAAH!

Whenever one of them pulls ahead, the other
immediately pushes forward. Neither of them
relents as their race continues.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: They both run so amazingly...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Ticket is tenacious and persists at full speed until
the very end... And the ferocity of Taishin's
pursuit is unparalleled.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Both of them are first-class competitors in their
own right. They're incredible.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Sorry, I know I was the one who asked to come
out here, but...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Can we try out our calculations another time? If
they see me now, well...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Thank you... You've been nothing but
accommodating today.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Um, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: I wanted to discuss my future plans...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I believe I should take on the Classic Triple Crown
tour as the next step of my journey.

It consists of the Satsuki Sho, the Japanese
Derby, and the Kikuka Sho.

And, just like the Japanese Derby, each one can
only be challenged once in a racer's life.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I want to perfect my winning equation so I can be
the greatest of my generation.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Barring that, I at least want to be an Umamusume
like none other. Otherwise, there's no way I can
ever hope to compete with Brian.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
And in order to reach that goal, I'll inevitably
need to confront Ticket and Taishin head-on.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Do I have your support in this endeavor?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Hehe! Thank you. I knew I could count on you.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to become the greatest Umamusume of
all time. One that neither Ticket nor Taishin nor
anyone else can beat.

Biwa Hayahide's words cement her decision to
enter the Satsuki Sho, the first race of the Classic
Triple Crown tour.
